subject: A pale, gaunt humanoid creature with a snarling fanged mouth and sunken black eye sockets, clawing its way forward through a thick black bog while skeletal hands reach up from the muck around it
description: A wretched, undead-looking figure dominates the foreground, mouth wrenched open in a roar to reveal sharp teeth, eyes empty and shadowed. Its skin is bone-pale and clings tight to the skull. It claws forward out of a viscous black mire that has half-swallowed it, while gnarled skeletal hands and arms claw upward from the surrounding tar, suggesting other damned souls trapped below. The setting is a dark, fog-choked underworld swamp with a sickly green-grey haze, broken stone or bone debris, and silhouetted figures lurking in the deep background. Lighting is murky and low, with a faint cold rim catching the screaming face.
foreground: snarling pale humanoid clawing out of black tar; skeletal hands grasping up around it
background: fog-choked underworld swamp with dim silhouettes and murky haze
emotion: anguished rage; desperation and feral aggression
